mapper.select: SELECT r.res_no AS resNo, s.space_name AS spaceName, u.title AS unitTitle, gd.nickname AS guestName, TO_CHAR(r.res_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS resDate, r.start_time AS startTime, r.end_time AS endTime, r.people_count AS peopleCount, r.total_price AS totalPrice, r.status AS status, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt FROM RESERVATION r JOIN SPACE_UNIT u ON r.unit_no = u.unit_no JOIN SPACE s ON u.space_no = s.space_no JOIN GUEST_DETAIL gd ON r.guest_id = gd.member_id WHERE s.host_id = #{hostId} ORDER BY r.res_no DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM RESERVATION r JOIN SPACE_UNIT u ON r.unit_no = u.unit_no JOIN SPACE s ON u.space_no = s.space_no WHERE s.host_id = #{hostId}
